product_page.title_descriptor: Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric
product_page.page_title: Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric - ArNeo Dirt Pro -Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 150 g/m², 100% Polyester (PES), Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric
description_blocks: ArNeo Dirt Pro is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets with extra water and oil repellent function.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
Water and oil repellent function.(EN ISO 14419)

technical_documents.label: >> ArNeo Dirt Pro Data Sheet
technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 150 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Water and Oil Repellent 4 EN ISO 4920 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Dirt Pro Data Sheet Certificates TS EN ISO 20471 TS EN ISO 20471 Test Report TS EN ISO 14419

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles

High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
100% Polyester, High Visible, Water and Oil Repellent Knit Fabric

ArNeo Dirt Pro is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets with extra water and oil repellent function. EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. Water and oil repellent function.(EN ISO 14419) Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Polyester (PES) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75/72 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 150 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa (kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 6.2 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Safety Jacket Quality Management Done ISO 9001 High Visibility Done EN ISO 20471 Water and Oil Repellent 4 EN ISO 4920 Technical Documents >> ArNeo Dirt Pro Data Sheet Certificates TS EN ISO 20471 TS EN ISO 20471 Test Report TS EN ISO 14419
